name: **WIP?** AU - "Minor Changes" Final Fourteen
description:
I made that image. In google slides.

Bro I don't know how to make Dirty Bubble in google slides so just pretend there's a gaping hole going to her right eye like the real Dirty Bubble.

My 5th bot overall, my 5th BFDI or Object Show bot,

Characters include: Cupcakes C00lBl0cky (Blocky + Forsaken Cupcakes C00lkidd), Cowboy Woody (Woody + Toy Story), Dirty Bubble (BFDI 26), Sad-co (sad Taco), Gela-paper (Gelatin + drawing), ygnopS (Spongy + inverted), Leaffriend (Leafy + FNF Boyfriend), Slashirey (Firey + Forsaken Milestone 4 Jason/Slasher), Rupert (an OC of mine related to Teardrop, + headcanons), Demopop (Lollipop + TF2 Demoman), Turquoise (Ruby's sister), Robot Flower (TPOT), Balloo (Balloony - his body), Gone-ser (Loser + Forsaken 007n7), Barber Cloudy / Barboudy (Cloudy + Forsaken Barber Jason/Slasher)

If you don't like this then okay. Plus no Four, X, Announcer, Profily, or Purple Face alternates until further mentioned (I have in mind Firey Speaker Box and Yellow Face but I will figure it out another time)

TAGS: Final Fourteen Alternate Universe Blocky Woody Bubble Taco Gelatin Spongy Leafy Firey Teardrop Lollipop Ruby Flower Balloony Loser Cloudy BFDI BFB Battle For Dream Island
creator: Liy fan
